docs.rawSection:
id="retrieving-exploit-changelogs" class="text-xl @xs:text-2xl @lg:text-3xl font-semibold heading pdf-heading flex items-baseline scroll-mt-(--content-scroll-margin) text-start self-start justify-start relative group/hash decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid column-first-of-type:pt-0 pt-[1em]" data-pdf-heading="true">
Retrieving exploit changelogs

You can obtain a current exploit status via this route:

Keep in mind we don't track changelogs for every exploit as it depends on whether or not their API has changelogs included.

GET https://weao.xyz/api/status/exploits/changelogs/[exploit]

GET https://weao.xyz/api/status/exploits/changelogs/[trackerId]

Example Response:

PreviousRoblox versionsNextsUNC Data

Last updated 0 minutes ago

  • Retrieving All Exploit Statuses
  • Retrieving a exploit status
  • Retrieving exploit changelogs
